name: RIC Dividends Received Deduction for Corporations

eligibility.description: Available to domestic corporations receiving dividends from a RIC that meets section 852(a) requirements and provides written statements designating the eligible portion.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Corporate shareholders of a Regulated Investment Company (RIC) may claim a dividends received deduction under section 243 for the portion of the dividend reported by the RIC as eligible.
